title: Security: UAF in CacheAliasSearchPrefetchURLLoader::StartPrefetchRequest
description_snippet:
**-------------------------**   
  
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
When you type things into omnibox, a request can be sent even if you don't press enter because Chromium can prefetch answers to make things speedier. As you press enter, Chromium will use `CacheAliasSearchPrefetchURLLoader` to check pr
